title: Why CACI International Crushed the Market Today
author: Eric Volkman
description: CACI International reported strong Q1 fiscal 2026 results, with 11% revenue growth and nearly 14% increase in non-GAAP net income, exceeding analyst expectations and boosting investor confidence.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company reported double-digit growth in revenue and net income, beat analyst expectations, maintained strong fiscal year guidance, and booked $5 billion in contract awards during the quarter

title: Why CACI International and Other Defense IT Stocks Fell Today
author: Lou Whiteman
description: CACI reported strong earnings, but investors were more focused on the uncertainty created by the new administration's effort to streamline government. The company believes it can be part of the answer, but investors are worried about potential changes in the way contracting is done, such as a shift from cost-plus to fixed-price contracts.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: CACI's earnings report was strong, but the focus was on the uncertainty around potential changes in government contracting, such as a shift from cost-plus to fixed-price contracts, which could impact the company's profitability.
Leidos' shares fell along with CACI's, as investors are worried about the potential impact of changes in government contracting on the sector.
Booz Allen Hamilton's shares fell along with CACI's, as investors are worried about the potential impact of changes in government contracting on the sector.
SAIC's shares fell along with CACI's, as investors are worried about the potential impact of changes in government contracting on the sector.

title: CACI Agrees To Acquire Azure Summit For $1.275B, Boosting Defense Capabilities
author: Lekha Gupta
description: CACI International is acquiring Azure Summit Technology for $1.275 billion, enhancing the company's Department of Defense capabilities through Azure Summit's advanced radio frequency technology and engineering expertise.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: CACI is acquiring Azure Summit to expand its offerings in intelligence, surveillance, reconnaissance, electronic warfare, and signals intelligence, which is expected to drive long-term shareholder value.

title: Garmin (GRMN) Boosts Fitness Offerings With Edge 1050 Launch
author: Zacks Equity Research
description: Garmin (GRMN) launches a smart cycling computer, namely Edge 1050, to strengthen offerings for cyclists.

title: Here's Why CACI International (CACI) is a Strong Value Stock
author: Zacks Equity Research
description: Whether you're a value, growth, or momentum investor, finding strong stocks becomes easier with the Zacks Style Scores, a top feature of the Zacks Premium research service.
